productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Blue Shirt
description: Composition Teal blue and black striped shirt made of a cotton blend dobbied fabric, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Slim Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Celebrate the Indian spirit in true style with this striped shirt from peter england's Shubhotsav festive collection. Crafted from a dobbied fabric and in styles influenced by the rich Indian heritage, this shirt offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
